meaning: n.社论adj.编辑上的,主笔的,社论的
examples: Your editorial blithely ignores the hard facts.
The editorial contained several factual errors.
We are not about to change our editorial policy.
Mr. ROBERT GEORGE (Associate Editor, Editorial Page, the New York Post): Glad to be here.
For more on this, we've got Robert George, associate editorial page editor for the New York Post.
